sections.paragraph:
Original: כּלכּל

Transliteration: kalkôl

Phonetic: kal-kole'

BDB Definition:

Calcol or Chalcol = "sustaining"
  1. son or descendant of Zerah of Judah and one of the wise men with whom Solomon was compared

Origin: from H3557

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
